118 _39IG BED_CHR_WC_GOAL_CD (39Ig) Transfers - Bed, chair, wheelchair: Goal CHAR 2 A score indicating the desired goal for the patient to achieve the ability to transfer from a bed to a chair and back, or from a bed to a wheelchair and back, or coming to a standing position if walking is the typical
